summary: The diff successfully addresses REQ-7 by implementing multiple fixes to prevent login page shaking and layout shifts. The changes include: (1) adding a fixed-width container with justify-end to the Header navigation to prevent layout shifts during authentication state changes, (2) adding min-width to LoginButton to ensure stable button size, (3) adding CSS rules for smooth scrolling and reduced motion support to prevent jarring animations. All changes align with the BuildRequest constraints of preserving LoginButton functionality and not modifying authentication logic.
